caption: The video features a close-up of a man named Patience, who is speaking directly to the camera. He appears to be sharing his personal story, explaining that he fled his country due to a lack of security. The background is blurred, drawing focus to his face and the serious expression on it. The subtitles at the bottom of the screen reinforce his words, emphasizing the gravity of his situation. The lighting highlights his facial features, adding to the emotional weight of his narrative. The overall tone of the video suggests a documentary or interview style, aiming to convey the man's experience and the challenges he faced.
